title: Exact Monotone Paths
description: Given integers m, n, and k, construct an m-row by n-column obstacle grid having exactly k distinct paths from the top-left cell to the bottom-right cell. Return the grid as list[str], using '.' for an open cell and '#' for an obstacle. Both endpoints must be open. A path may visit only open cells and at each step may move exactly one cell right or one cell down. Return [] exactly when no such grid exists; otherwise any grid satisfying all requirements is valid.
input_contract: Integers m, n, k with 1 <= m, n <= 10 and 1 <= k <= 4.
output_contract: Return list[str] using only '.' and '#', or [] when infeasible.
